### Funding

### Current External Research Funding

#### 1. NIA-5R01AG080635-03 — Validation of the Remote Cognitive Aging and Alzheimer’s Disease Research (R-CARE) Toolbox for Diverse Populations

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Principal Investigator of subaward | Prime: Albert Einstein College of Medicine | NIH/NIA | 2023–2028 | $868,564 | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search) |

#### 2. NIA-5R21AG078846-02 — Perceived Ethnic Discrimination and Cognitive Function in Mexican-origin Adults

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Principal Investigator of subaward | Prime: University of Texas at Austin; PI: Dr. Liz Muñoz | NIH/NIA | 2022–2024 | $90,232 | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search) |

#### 3. NIA-5P01AG003949-12 — Einstein Aging Study, Project: Air Pollution and Cognitive Function

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Co-Principal Investigator | Albert Einstein College of Medicine; Co-PI: Dr. Charles B. Hall | NIH/NIA | 2022–2027 | $911,768; 35% allocation | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/project-details/11092245) |

#### 4. NIA-5P01AG003949-12 — Einstein Aging Study, Core: Technology and Data Management Core

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Core Leader; Principal Investigator of subaward | Albert Einstein College of Medicine | NIH/NIA | 2022–2027 | $1,696,559; 19% allocation | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search/sTurp4Mlm0y-kLmPPdCgSQ/project-details/11092267) |

#### 5. NIA-U2CAG060408 — Mobile Monitoring of Cognitive Change (M2C2)

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Principal Investigator of subaward while at University of Central Florida | Prime award | NIH/NIA | 2022–2023 | $50,000 | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search) |

#### 6. NIA-R44AG056250 — A Non-Pharmacological Multi-Modal Therapy to Improve Sleep and Cognition and Reduce Mild Cognitive Impairment Risk

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Principal Investigator of subaward while at University of Central Florida | Prime: Proactive Life, Inc. | NIH/NIA | 2021–2022 | $14,685 | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search) |

#### 7. NIA-R03AG067009 — Investigating Medication Errors in Daily Life: Discovering Person-specific and Situation-specific Risk Factors

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Principal Investigator | Nelson A. Roque | NIH/NIA | July 2020–May 2022 | $149,000 | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search/mg5_EPGNUEOk8qjMvM2JUA/project-details/10202481) |

#### 8. NIA-240459 — Advancing Mobile Monitoring of Intraindividual Change in Alzheimer’s Disease and Related Dementias: Building an Open and Inclusive Infrastructure

| Role | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Co-Core Leader, Data Management and Analytics Core | NIH/NIA | 2024–2029 | $19,844,799 | [NIH RePORTER](https://reporter.nih.gov/search/z-Zq4ZPDxkmZB8t_9Kda9w/project-details/11118298) |

| Core | Allocation | Costs |
|---|---:|---:|
| Technical Core | 10% | $4,372,510 |
| Data Core | 10% | $2,142,145 |

#### 9. The Peanut Institute Foundation — Peanut butter, glycemic control, cognition, and cardiovascular health.

| Role | PI / Prime | Sponsor | Period | Total Costs | Public Record |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Co-Investigator | Nelson A. Roque | The Peanut Institute (TPI) Foundation | May 2026-June 2027 | $290,000 |
